feedback: All 9 acceptance criteria met. _ChannelSemaphore wraps asyncio.Semaphore cleanly with backward-compat _value shim for existing tests. code_quality -1: _value setter still writes to self._sem._value (internal access once removed, kept for sync). correctness -1: _ChannelSemaphore._available counter and self._sem._value can diverge if release() is called more times than acquire() (no bound check), but this matches asyncio.Semaphore behavior so acceptable. Pre-existing test_phase69 / test_zombie_channel_guard failures confirmed pre-date this sprint.
